detection_agent.training_time: O(n * d)  -- TF-IDF vectorization + LR fitting
detection_agent.inference_time: O(d)      -- single dot product per sample
detection_agent.space: O(n * d)  -- TF-IDF matrix; O(d) for LR weights

verification_agent.inference_time: O(m)      -- cosine similarity vs corpus mean
verification_agent.notes: m=6,420 real statements; cosine similarity to mean = O(d)

decision_agent_fixed.training_time: O(1)      -- no training; weights are heuristic

adaptive_fusion.training_time: O(n_holdout * k * T)  -- GB with T=200 trees on k=6 features

full_system.training_time: O(n*d + m*d + n_h*k*T)  -- dominated by TF-IDF
full_system.inference_time: O(d + m + k)              -- linear per sample

vs_bert.memory_ratio: BERT requires ~440MB weights + 8GB GPU; L-MAS: ~15MB CPU
